Class BaseStyleBuilder<T extends BaseStyleBuilder<T,U>, U extends DRBaseStyle>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<T,U>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.style.BaseStyleBuilder<T,U>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConditionalStyleBuilder, SimpleStyleBuilder, StyleBuilder
public abstract class BaseStyleBuilder<T extends BaseStyleBuilder<T,U>, U extends DRBaseStyle> extends AbstractBuilder<T,U>

Abstract BaseStyleBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
See Also:
